title: Shader Chip Loadout
hook: A flat dull screenshot has 8 effect zones and a tray of 12 shader chips — pick 5 that combine to hit the publisher's hidden juice target.
hook_ru: Плоский серый скриншот, 8 зон эффектов и 12 чипов шейдеров — подбери 5, чтобы попасть в скрытую цель сочности издателя.
core_mechanic: Composition puzzle: drop 5 of 12 shader chips into 8 zones to match a hidden 5-dim juice vector. 6 swap budget, daily seed.

sources.signal: Cheap screen-space VFX trend — players responding to shader/post-process effects in casuals
Juice meta — bubble-shooter style scoring readout as primary feedback
Composition-puzzle pacing — calm staring, no timer
Contrast — prior shader-themed game was timing-based; this is loadout/composition. Avoid same failure mode.

why_novel: Meta-puzzle about juice composition. Players learn shader stacking by play. No portal clones in this niche.
